overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a rainy neon-lit urban residential district at night. The player moves from under an overpass through streets lined with palm trees and futuristic billboards, crossing intersections and entering a residential courtyard with parked vehicles and groups of NPCs.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward from under the overpass toward the open street and large circular billboard

concrete overhead structure providing shelter overhead
large cylindrical billboard with colorful rotating advertisements and neon lighting
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky lining the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a concrete overpass with red and white striped barriers visible to the left. The player moves forward from this sheltered area toward an open street, with a large illuminated circular billboard and palm trees visible in the distance against the night sky.

approaching intersection with visible pedestrians and buildings ahead

two-story buildings with illuminated windows and traditional architecture

segments.scene_description: Now on the open street, the player walks past streetlights illuminating the wet asphalt, with residential buildings on the left and palm trees lining the road. The circular billboard moves to the left side of the frame as the player approaches an intersection where pedestrians are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with crosswalk and vehicle traffic

events.description: orange van drives across the intersection from right to left in front of the player
turning left into residential courtyard area from the main intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while navigating around vehicles and pedestrians, then turning into a residential side street

pedestrian in purple tank top and blue shorts walking ahead of the player into the residential area

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the intersection and crosses as an orange van drives past. The environment shifts from the main street to a more residential area with parked cars visible ahead. The player follows a pedestrian in a purple tank top, turning left into a courtyard area with buildings on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential courtyard with parked vehicles and gathering NPCs

events.description: approaching group of NPCs gathered near a parked black van
slowing down while navigating through the courtyard with parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking through the residential courtyard observing the parked vehicles and groups of NPCs congregating near the buildings

entered.detail: dark colored van with 6TH STREET and contact information printed on the side panel
silver sedan parked in the courtyard near the group of NPCs
covered porch with stairs leading up to a teal colored door and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The player enters a residential courtyard where several cars are parked including a black van with 6TH STREET markings. Groups of NPCs are gathered near the buildings, with some standing by the van and a child running near a porch with a teal door. The environment feels lived-in with warm light coming from the building windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban underpass into a lived-in residential courtyard under a rainy night sky. It begins beneath a concrete overpass beside red and white striped barriers, moving forward toward an open street where a large illuminated circular billboard and palm trees glow in the distance. As the camera emerges onto the wet asphalt, it passes streetlights and residential buildings before reaching an intersection where an orange van drives past. The scene then shifts away from the main road as the camera follows a pedestrian in a purple tank top, turning left to enter a more intimate residential area. Finally, the movement concludes in a courtyard filled with parked cars, including a black 6th Street van, where groups of NPCs gather near buildings with warm light spilling from the windows.
